subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Adored One, Who is worthy and befitting of glorification in every cycle and every age, nay rather, in every year and every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت معبودی را لایق و سزاست که در هر قرن و هر عصر بلکه در هر سنه و هر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
